response.justification: Bogdan has deep technical expertise, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent-asserts), and a strong track record of technical leadership and open-source contributions, but lacks clear evidence of formal people management experience beyond team collaboration and workshops, and his resume doesn't explicitly confirm 3+ years in people management or mobile platform leadership as required.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools and test automation frameworks (e.g., Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven technical leadership through open-source projects and knowledge sharing (workshops, talks, CI/CD setup)
Broad technical stack across mobile (iOS/Apple TV), build systems, and infrastructure (D, Node.js, Kubernetes)
concerns: No explicit mention of people management responsibilities or team leadership reports
Mobile platform experience is limited to iOS app maintenance, not ecosystem-wide tooling leadership
Resume lacks clear quantifiable impact on engineering productivity at organizational scale
